descriptionShort: Humboldt Broncos beat Richmond Sockeyes 2-1 in Centennial Cup Tier II Western Canadian final playoff game.
descriptionLong: Bill McDougall and Brad Bergen each scored for the Humboldt Broncos in their 2-1 victory over the Richmond Sockeyes on Saturday night in Centennial Cup Tier II junior hockey action. Dean Rutledge scored for Richmond. The best-of-seven Western Canadian final series is tied 2-2, with teams meeting again in Richmond on subsequent dates.

attribution.headline: Humboldt defeats Richmond 2-1 in Centennial Cup series
